description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a compact, ergonomic frame. The slide features serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and the barrel is short, consistent with concealed carry or law enforcement sidearms. The grip is contoured with finger grooves and textured panels for secure handling, and the magazine base is slightly extended with a beveled edge for easier reloading. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers and additional control. Visible markings on the slide include manufacturer and model information, and the sights are low-profile with a red front dot for quick target acquisition.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, rear slide serrations, and a beveled magazine base. Features include low-profile sights and visible slide markings.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the rear sight, slide serrations, and the contoured grip with visible texturing.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the slide markings, ejection port, slide serrations, and the ergonomic grip with finger grooves.
description_view_2: The front view displays the muzzle, front sight with a red dot, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals additional slide details, the slide stop lever, and the full contour of the grip and magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with pronounced finger grooves and a stippled texture for enhanced control and comfort. It appears to be made of black polymer with a matte finish, featuring ergonomic shaping to fit the hand naturally. The lower portion of the grip includes a subtle palm swell and a visible logo or branding on the side. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the front strap is textured for additional grip security. The magazine base extends slightly beyond the grip, providing a small ledge for the pinky finger.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a generous opening to accommodate gloved fingers. It features a slight undercut at the rear for improved grip access and control. The guard is thick and smoothly contoured, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a streamlined appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the slide, typical of compact handguns. It has a standard profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The muzzle is circular and clean, with a matte black finish matching the rest of the slide. No external markings or embellishments are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on the left side, including the manufacturer's name and model designation in a clear, sans-serif font. These markings are located just above the trigger area and are subtle but legible against the matte black finish. No decorative patterns or serial numbers are visible in the provided views.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly extended and beveled, providing a smooth transition from the grip to the magazine. It has a flat bottom with a subtle flare at the rear, aiding in magazine removal and insertion. The base appears to be made of the same black polymer as the grip, with minimal texturing and no visible finger rest or logos.
